info.title: FeatureSignals API
info.description: Complete API reference for FeatureSignals — feature flag management platform

tags.name: Evaluation
tags.description: Flag evaluation for SDKs and clients

post.description: Creates a new user account and returns authentication tokens.
Authenticates a user and returns JWT tokens.
Exchanges a valid refresh token for a new access token.
Sends a verification link to the user's email address.

get.description: Verifies the user's email using a token from the verification link.
Returns all projects the authenticated user has access to.

post.description: Creates a new project with a default set of environments.

get.description: Returns a single project by ID.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a project and all associated resources.

get.description: Returns all environments in a project.

post.description: Creates a new environment in the specified project.

delete.description: Permanently deletes an environment and its associated flag states.

get.description: Returns all feature flags in a project.

post.description: Creates a new feature flag in the project.

get.description: Returns a single feature flag by key.

put.description: Updates the flag definition (name, description, tags, etc.).

example.name: New Checkout v2
example.description: Updated checkout with faster payment processing

delete.description: Permanently deletes a feature flag and all associated state.

get.description: Returns the flag's state (enabled, targeting rules, percentage) for a specific environment.

put.description: Updates the flag's enabled status, targeting rules, or rollout percentage for a specific environment.

post.description: Copies the flag state from one environment to the next in the promotion order.
Instantly disables the flag across all environments. Use for emergency rollbacks.

get.description: Returns per-flag differences between two environments (enabled, rollout, rules, default value).

post.description: Bulk-promotes selected flags from source to target environment.

post.summary: Inspect entity — evaluate all flags for one entity
post.description: Evaluates all flags for a specific entity context and returns per-flag values, reasons, and targeting info.

post.summary: Compare two entities side by side
post.description: Evaluates all flags for two different entity contexts and returns a diff.

get.description: Returns per-flag true/false evaluation distribution for the given environment.

post.description: Evaluates a feature flag for the given context and returns its value.
Evaluates all (or specified) flags for the given context in a single request.

get.summary: Get all flag values for client
get.description: Returns all evaluated flag values for a client environment key. Used by client-side SDKs.
Opens a Server-Sent Events stream for real-time flag updates. SDKs use this for instant propagation.
Returns all segments in a project.

post.description: Creates a new user segment with targeting rules.

get.description: Returns a single segment by key.

put.description: Updates a segment's name, description, or rules.

delete.description: Permanently deletes a segment. Flags referencing it will stop matching.

get.description: Returns all API keys for an environment.

post.description: Creates a new API key for the environment. The full key is only returned once.

delete.description: Revokes and permanently deletes an API key.

get.description: Returns all members of the current organization.

post.description: Sends an invitation email to add a new team member.

delete.description: Removes a team member from the organization.

get.description: Returns the granular permissions assigned to a team member.

put.description: Sets granular permissions for a team member.

get.description: Returns all pending and recent approval requests.

post.description: Requests approval for a flag state change before it takes effect.

get.description: Returns details of a single approval request.

post.description: Approves or rejects a pending approval request.

get.description: Returns all configured webhooks.

post.description: Creates a new webhook endpoint for flag change events.

get.description: Returns a single webhook by ID.

put.description: Updates a webhook's URL, events, or secret.

get.description: Returns delivery history for a webhook including status codes and payloads.
Returns a paginated audit log of all actions performed in the organization.
Returns evaluation counts and latency metrics for flags over a time range.

post.description: Resets evaluation counters for the specified scope.
Generates PayU form fields for upgrading the subscription plan via merchant-hosted checkout.

get.description: Returns the current subscription plan, status, and renewal date.
Returns current billing period usage: evaluations, flags, environments, team seats.
Returns the current user's onboarding checklist and completion status.
Returns the canonical pricing configuration for all plans. Public endpoint, no authentication required.

post.description: Exchanges a single-use one-time token for a full JWT pair. Used for cross-domain authentication after payment redirects.
DEPRECATED: Returns 410 Gone. Anonymous demo sessions are no longer supported. Use POST /v1/auth/register with source='demo' instead.
Converts an anonymous demo session into a registered account with email, password, and organization details.
Choose a subscription plan after converting from demo. Returns PayU checkout data for Pro plan.
Submit feedback from a demo user when declining to register or requesting enhancements.

example.message: Great product! Would love a Terraform provider.

BearerAuth.description: JWT access token obtained from /v1/auth/login or /v1/auth/register

ApiKeyAuth.name: X-API-Key
ApiKeyAuth.description: Environment API key for server-side or client-side SDK access

category.description: Toggle category based on Martin Fowler's taxonomy

BulkEvaluateRequest.description: When `flagKeys` is provided, it may contain at most 100 flag keys.

flagKeys.description: Optional list of flag keys to evaluate. Maximum 100 items.

key.description: Full API key — only returned on creation
